notes: Short focused file (237 lines, 6 decls) that resolves reviewer round-21 'Wall B' for the Frobenius component of the generic-point covariance leaf, axiom-clean and CoordHom-free. The scalar-tower diamond (frobeniusAlgHom is only 𝔽_q-linear, not K̄-linear) is handled by typing frobFunctionFieldPointKbar via W' := W rather than W.baseChange K̄, with a bridging lemma (tau_mapW) resolving the cross-W' mismatch. Wall A (opaque baseChangePullback at the generic point) is explicitly left open and documented.
